label: POC
note: Immunity scaling exponent for infection (CoP^gamma); dimensionless. Identical in both scripts (0.4/2). NOTE: script CoP is anti-Vi on a ~1-3000 scale like the calibration's EU/mL-relative CoP, so gamma is roughly comparable.

Mapped by functional-form role only. Plus the same ingested-vs-bicarb frame caveat as N50_inf. Interpret with care.
